item.title: Mutify 1.1.0
item.description:
Mutify 1.1.0 — Tabbed Settings, device picker, auto-update, and more

New features

  • Show / hide menu bar icon and Dock icon from Settings.
  • Input device picker with per-device mute memory — pin a specific mic or follow the system default.
  • Separate Force Mute and Force Unmute global shortcuts (in addition to Toggle).
  • Auto-mute when macOS Focus / Do Not Disturb turns on.
  • VoiceOver announcements for mute state changes (opt-in).
  • Local-only daily statistics — toggle count and total muted duration, never leaves your Mac.
  • Three menu bar icon styles: Adaptive, Colorful, Monochrome.
  • Optional "MUTED" label next to the icon when muted.
  • Built-in auto-update via Sparkle — Check for Updates is now in the menu and Settings → Advanced.

UI improvements

  • Brand-new tabbed Settings window: General · Shortcuts · Audio · Appearance · Advanced.
  • Custom segmented header (no more SwiftUI TabView seam line) and a clean card-based layout for every tab.
  • Settings is now reachable from a gear button on the Main window, plus the menu bar item.
  • Left- and right-click on the menu bar icon both open the menu — the Main window is reachable via Show Mutify Window.
  • Crisp vector GitHub icon.

Fixes

  • VoiceOver announcements were silently dropped — now correctly fire when the toggle is enabled and VoiceOver is running.
  • Sparkle framework load failure (Team ID mismatch) resolved by enabling the disable-library-validation entitlement.
